text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: D-did that announcement just say...<n>the 4,000-meter scavenger hunt<n>obstacle race has already started?

text_block_list.name: Referee
text_block_list.text: Peep! The quiz run will now begin!All competitors to their startingpositions, please!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Okay, get ready to chant, everyone!<n>Raise your voices as one with the<n>Cheer Squad!

text_block_list.name: Squad Member A
text_block_list.text: W-wait, Captain! Are you sure?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What do you mean? The competition<n>has already started. Our only priority<n>right now is supporting the racers in<n>front of us.

text_block_list.name: Squad Member A
text_block_list.text: But King, you've been set on<n>cheering for Kawakami this whole<n>time, haven't you?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: H-how did you know that?

text_block_list.name: Squad Member B
text_block_list.text: I-I can tell! We all can! We've been<n>by your side this whole time, after all!

text_block_list.name: Squad Member B
text_block_list.text: At first I... I wasn't sure about your<n>methods. But seeing how you talked<n>to us and encouraged us, I finally<n>realized something.

text_block_list.name: Squad Member B
text_block_list.text: Pearl's squad uniform includes an<n>"SP" emblem. Nature's has an "NN"<n>belt charm.

text_block_list.name: Squad Member B
text_block_list.text: The uniforms you gave us have each<n>of our initials on them. From the<n>beginning, you weren't only thinking<n>about the competitors...

text_block_list.name: Squad Member B
text_block_list.text: You were thinking about us as well,<n>trying to lift us up!

text_block_list.name: Squad Member A
text_block_list.text: S-so this time, it's our turn to return<n>the sentiment and make you proud!<n>Please, go and be there for the<n>person you want to cheer on the<n>most!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Don't be absurd.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Your voice is shaking, you know? If<n>you lead the cheers like that, you'll<n>only make everyone less confident.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Besides, I am a first-rate cheer<n>captain. Leaving you all here like this<n>and going off on my own would be<n>far too irresponsible.

text_block_list.name: Squad Member A
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: In that case, how about another<n>first-rate leader fills in for you?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: The disciplinary committee found a<n>cheer banner you must've dropped,<n>so here I am! Bamboo Memory,<n>former Cheer Squad captain!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Huh? Bamboo? What are you doing<n>here? And what's with the outfit?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: It's last year's squad captain outfit!<n>Listen to this.

text_block_list.name: Pearl (On the Phone)
text_block_list.text: "Hey Bamboo! Are you at the gym?!<n>Please convince King that you'll take<n>care of the Cheer Squad!"

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: It's only natural to step up when I'm<n>being asked for help!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hruoooghhh! I can barely contain<n>myself! Will you all join me in this<n>chant?!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Whoa, it's last year's squad captain!<n>Her voice is so loud! What a fun<n>surprise!

text_block_list.name: Squad Member A
text_block_list.text: ...Captain, please! Go on ahead!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Hey, let's encourage our captain too!<n>Go for it! Leave the cheers here to us!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Gasp! ...Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: We're now midway through the<n>4,000-meter scavenger hunt obstacle<n>race! No one has dropped out just<n>yet, but...

text_block_list.name: Competitors
text_block_list.text: YAAAGH! RRRAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Cap-Wearing spectator
text_block_list.text: Ah, the girls in the back look<n>exhausted. D'you think they'll make<n>it?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I will... finish this ra... huff... I will!Puff...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: DON'T LOSE THIIIIIS!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Everyone! Now's the time to shout!<n>In this difficult competition, they need<n>your support to see it through to the<n>end!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Each and every one of your voices<n>makes it through to their hearts! Let's<n>unite our voices in support! Ready,<n>aaand—

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hooray! Hooray! Tracen!

text_block_list.name: Seated Spectator
text_block_list.text: Huh? Hooray... Hooray?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: That's the spirit! Now let's try once<n>more, but even louder! On the count of<n>three, "hooray, hooray," okay? One,<n>two, three!

text_block_list.name: King and Fans
text_block_list.text: Hooray! Hooray! You can do it!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Wonderful! Let's keep chanting to the<n>same rhythm! Hooray! Hooray!

text_block_list.name: King and Fans
text_block_list.text: You can do it! Hooray! Hooray! You<n>can do it!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...Let's gooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Kawakami Princess darts forward<n>again! The racers are making their<n>way up the slope one after another!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Go on! You can do it! Keep pushing!<n>Don't give up till the end!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Yes! More! Keep the cheers going!<n>Anyone who's unsure of the timing,<n>follow along with me! Ready? And—

text_block_list.name: King and Fans
text_block_list.text: Hooray! Hooray! Tracen!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: All racers have climbed the slope!<n>We're at the top! The final straight is<n>a scavenger hunt! Each racer will aim<n>to cross the finish line with a<n>designated item in hand!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Kiiing! Your sash! Can you lend me<n>your sash? The item I need is a sash!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What?! But this sash is sewn onto<n>my top! Ahhh, guess I have no<n>choice!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Go get first place!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Ohhh! Go, go, gooo! Almost there!<n>Come on!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Yes, go on! You can do it! Just a bit<n>more to go!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: (As long as you keep looking<n>forward, I will shout for you even if it<n>ruins my voice!)

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: (Because supporting you as you run<n>towards this goal, and cheering you<n>on towards your dreams...)

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Is the greatest honor a fan could ask<n>for!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: GO OOOOON!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: UUURAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Woo!
